title: Riot Platforms Reports Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Riot Platforms achieved total revenue of $376.7 million in 2024, compared to $280.7 million in 2023, representing 34% revenue growth. Bitcoin mining revenue reached $321.0 million for 2024, compared to $189.0 million in 2023, primarily driven by higher average Bitcoin prices and increased operational hash rate. Riot produced 4,828 Bitcoin in 2024 as compared to 6,626 during 2023, decline occurred despite operational expansion because Bitcoin network underwent a halving in April 2024, and global hash rate increased 67% over the course of the year. Average cost to mine Bitcoin, excluding depreciation, was $32,216 in 2024, compared to $3,831 per Bitcoin in 2023. Increase was primarily driven by 53% decrease in power credits received, the block subsidy halving event, and 67% increase in average global network hash rate. Riot held 17,722 unencumbered Bitcoin, equating to approximately $1.65 billion based on market price of $93,354 per Bitcoin on December 31, 2024. Riot generated record adjusted EBITDA of $463.2 million in 2024, demonstrating value of their Bitcoin treasury policy of retaining Bitcoin production.
